sobre.metaDescription: Astrobotanica is run by Pedro, a researcher in the field, covering bench research and the journey of plants beyond Earth.
sobre.title: About
sobre.intro: Astrobotanica is a science communication project about space research involving plants — from off-Earth agriculture to plant physiology in extreme environments.
